# SparkleReleaseKit

SparkleReleaseKit adds a safe, reproducible Sparkle 2 update workflow to an existing macOS Xcode app.

Primary documentation:
- README: https://github.com/LeonTOfficial/SparkleReleaseKit/blob/main/README.md
- AI integration: https://github.com/LeonTOfficial/SparkleReleaseKit/blob/main/AI/AI_INTEGRATION.md
- Security model: https://github.com/LeonTOfficial/SparkleReleaseKit/blob/main/docs/SECURITY_MODEL.md
- CLI reference: https://github.com/LeonTOfficial/SparkleReleaseKit/blob/main/docs/CLI_REFERENCE.md
- Configuration schema: https://github.com/LeonTOfficial/SparkleReleaseKit/blob/main/schemas/sparklekit.schema.json
- Official Sparkle documentation: https://sparkle-project.org/documentation/

Agent workflow:
1. Inspect the target macOS project.
2. Run `sparklekit setup <project-path>`.
3. Add only the public EdDSA key to sparklekit.json.
4. Preview with `sparklekit integrate <project-path>`.
5. Apply with `sparklekit integrate <project-path> --apply`.
6. Follow the generated SparkleReleaseKit/INTEGRATION.md.
7. Run `sparklekit doctor`, build in Release, and verify a real archive.
8. Use `sparklekit test --json` and `sparklekit validate-feed --json` for deterministic completion evidence.
9. Prepare release staging with `sparklekit prepare-release`; private signing keys remain in Keychain or protected CI secrets.

Never expose or commit private update-signing keys, Apple certificates, App Store Connect keys, passwords, or tokens.
